summary: Lead accepts M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001 after systems_architect R3 ACCEPT and qa_reviewer R3 ACCEPT. The accepted change adds a minimal deterministic M3 succession state machine with ruler death/incapacity commands, candidate/support state, pending/resolved crises, peaceful and disputed outcomes, dead/unavailable character invariants, office/enfeoffment vacancy behavior, stable tie-breakers, and a read model query. R1/R2/R3 review rounds fixed structured succession schema validation and the QA-found dead-then-incapacitated invariant gap. The diff remains confined to allowed sim-core/protocol/test/project messaging paths and does not add client UI, save-format support, formal historical dynasty data, full diplomacy, full civil war, M4+ war behavior, random/time APIs, or Node/DOM authority.

decisions: Lead accepts the systems_architect R3 ACCEPT and qa_reviewer R3 ACCEPT reviews and marks M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001 ACCEPTED, pending PR integration before CLOSED.

The task implements only the M3 minimal succession scaffold: no full civil war, full diplomacy, narrative event system, historical dynasty database, client UI, save-format support, or M4+ war behavior.
Player, AI, and system actors use versioned GameCommand paths for status recording, succession resolution, and relationship mutation; no UI or object graph authority is introduced.

Dead or incapacitated characters are excluded from active office/enfeoffment holdings; death vacates offices/enfeoffments while preserving policies, and malformed worlds now report structured invariant paths.
Candidate support sources are explicit, serializable, and deterministically ordered with stable support/character tie-breakers.
M3 save/runtime support remains deferred to M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001; current save canaries still pass because this task does not extend save-format.
risks: Succession support weights and thresholds are M3 scaffold constants, not final historical dynasty law or full diplomacy/civil-war behavior.
M3 runtime save/load remains intentionally deferred to M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001.
Hand-mutated malformed worlds may include hash-mismatch diagnostics alongside structured semantic errors; QA accepted this because stable invariant paths are present.
requested_action: Create the feature commit and PR for M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001. After the PR is merged into main and verified, close the task in a separate closure branch. Do not start the next M3 task before integration.
